episodes.name: All Episodes Combined
episodes.overview: With the unusual tactics of running Hotel Aalishan exposed to his father, Aakash seeks to repair the damage. In this quest, he crosses paths with Tanvi, a tourist guide, leading to an unprecedented collaboration.
